import axios from'axios';const EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL="http://10.0.3.14:8080/api/v1/employees";class EmployeeService{getEmployees(){return axios.get(EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL);}createEmployee(employee){return axios.post(EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL,employee);}getEmployeeById(employeeId){return axios.get(`${EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL}/${employeeId}`);}updateEmployee(employee,employeeId){return axios.put(`${EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL}/${employeeId}`,employee);}deleteEmployee(employeeId){return axios.delete(`${EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL}/${employeeId}`);}}// Named instance to satisfy ESLint
const employeeService=new EmployeeService();export default employeeService;
